.form-body {
    background-color: #fff!important;
    background: linear-gradient(45deg, #fff -9.49%, #fff  54.36%) !important;
    border-radius: 10px!important;
    margin: 2px!important;
    margin-top: 5px!important;
    padding: 15px 0!important;
}

.form-title {
    background: #eee !important;
}

.form-step span {
    font-family: var(--headlinefont) !important;
}

.container-order-form-two-step .form-title {
    border-radius: 10px !important;
    margin: 1px !important;
    margin-bottom: 5px !important;
}

.form-btn {
    background: #f87e00!important;
    border-radius: 75px!important;
    margin-top: 20px!important;
    color: #fff!important;
    border: 0!important;
    text-transform: capitalize;
    font-weight: 500!important;
    letter-spacing: 1px!important;
    transition: 0.20s;
}

.apply-btn {
    background: #f87e00!important;
    border-radius: 75px!important
}

.form-btn .main-text {
    font-size: 1.3rem!important;
    font-weight: 900!important;
}

.product-detail {
    border: 2px solid #e7f3fe!important;
    padding: 15px 25px 5px 25px!important;
    /* margin-bottom: 15px; */
    border-radius: 10px!important;
    /* background: #fafcfe; */
    margin-top: 10px!important;
    color: #000!important;
}

.separator {
    border: 2px solid #e7f3fe;
    border-width: 2px 2px 0 2px;
    padding: 15px 25px 5px 25px;
    border-radius: 10px 10px 0 0;
    background: #f7fbfe;
    margin: 25px 0 0 0px!important;
    padding: 10px 0!important;
    color: #000!important;
}

.product-cost-total {
    border: 2px solid #e7f3fe;
    border-width: 0 2px 2px 2px;
    padding: 15px 25px 5px 25px;
    margin-bottom: 15px;
    border-radius: 0 0 10px 10px;
    background: #f7fbfe;
    color: #000!important;
}

.payment-form {
    background: #e7f3fe33;
    border: 2px solid #e7f3feaa;
    padding: 15px 25px 25px 25px;
    /* margin-bottom: 15px; */
    border-radius: 10px;
    /* background: #fafcfe; */
    margin-top: 15px!important;
}

.coupon-container {
    margin-top: 20px!important;
}

.form-step .active {
    color: #000!important;
    font-size: 24px!important;
}

.container-order-form-two-step {
    box-shadow: none!important;
}

.form-heading {
    font-size: 18px!important;
}

.container-order-form-two-step .form-title {
    padding: 0px!important;
}

.form-title div:first-child {
    box-shadow: 2px 0 0px 0px #fff !important;
}

.form-step {
    padding: 15px 15px!important;
}

.divider-form i, .step2 i {
    color: #0094ba!important;
}

.divider-form {
    background: #0094ba!important;
}

.form-step .active {
    font-size: 22px!important;
    line-height: 1.1!important;
    font-weight: 900!important;
}

.form-sub-heading {
    padding-top: 5px;
    color: #333 !important;
    font-weight: 600 !important;
    font-size: 12px !important;
}

.order-bump-container .main-section {
    justify-content: center!important;
}

.order-bump-container {
    margin-top: 15px!important;
    background-color: #fff!important;
    color: #000!important;
}

.order-bump-container .main-section {
    background-color: #f8f8f8!important;
}

.order-bump-container .headline {
    color: #000!important;
}

.order-bump-container p {
    font-size: 14px !important;
    line-height: 1.4!important;
    padding: 5px 10px!important;
}

.bump-image {
    margin-top: 10px!important;
    max-width: 200px!important;
    margin-left: auto!important;
    margin-right: auto!important;
    display: block!important;
}

@media only screen and (max-width: 770px) and (min-width: 0px) {
    .form-step .active {
        font-size: 20px!important;
    }
}

.divider-form {
    background: #F87E00 !important;
}

.divider-form i, .step2 i {
    color: #F87E00 !important;
}

.menu-item, .header-btn .main-heading-button {
    animation: primary_nav_hover_reverse ease-out 150ms 1;
    animation-fill-mode: forwards;
}

.menu-item:hover, .main-heading-button:hover {
    animation: primary_nav_hover ease-out 300ms 1;
}

@keyframes primary_nav_hover {
    0% {
        transform: translateY(0);
        opacity: 1;
    }

    49% {
        transform: translateY(25%);
        opacity: 0;
    }

    50% {
        transform: translateY(-25%);
        opacity: 0;
    }

    100% {
        transform: translateY(0);
        opacity: 1;
    }
}

@keyframes primary_nav_hover_reverse {
    0% {
        transform: translateY(0);
        opacity: 1;
    }

    50% {
        transform: translateY(25%);
        opacity: 0;
    }

    51% {
        transform: translateY(-25%);
        opacity: 0;
    }

    100% {
        transform: translateY(0);
        opacity: 1;
    }
}

.order-bump-container {
    border: 2px solid #4CAF50 !important;
    border-radius: 12px !important;
    background-color: #f9f9f9 !important;
    box-shadow: 0 4px 10px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.08) !important;
    padding: 25px !important;
    margin: 20px 0 !important;
    position: relative !important;
    transition: all 0.3s ease-in-out !important;
}

.order-bump-container:hover {
    transform: scale(1.02) !important;
    box-shadow: 0 6px 15px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.12) !important;
    border-color: #2e7d32 !important;
}

.order-bump-container::before {
    content: "🔥 HUGE VALUE!";
    position: absolute;
    top: -12px;
    left: -12px;
    background-color: #4CAF50;
    color: white;
    padding: 5px 10px;
    font-size: 12px;
    font-weight: bold;
    border-radius: 0 0 12px 0;
    box-shadow: 0 2px 6px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.2);
    z-index: 5;
}

.order-bump-container .bump-headline {
    font-size: 20px !important;
    font-weight: 700 !important;
    color: #333 !important;
    margin-top: 10px !important;
    text-align: center;
}

.order-bump-container input.bump--checkbox {
    margin-top: 10px !important;
    transform: scale(1.2) !important;
}

.order-bump-container img.bump--flashing-arrow {
    max-width: 80px !important;
    margin-bottom: 10px !important;
}

.order-bump-container p {
    font-size: 16px !important;
    color: #444 !important;
    line-height: 1.5 !important;
    margin-top: 10px !important;
}

/* Order Form */

.form-body {
    background-color: #fff!important;
    background: linear-gradient(45deg, #fff -9.49%, #fff  54.36%) !important;
    border-radius: 10px!important;
    margin: 2px!important;
    margin-top: 5px!important;
    padding: 15px 0!important;
}

.form-title {
    background: #eee !important;
}

.form-step span {
    font-family: var(--headlinefont) !important;
}

.container-order-form-two-step .form-title {
    border-radius: 10px !important;
    margin: 1px !important;
    margin-bottom: 5px !important;
}

.form-btn {
    background: #f87e00!important;
    border-radius: 75px!important;
    margin-top: 20px!important;
    color: #fff!important;
    border: 0!important;
    text-transform: capitalize;
    font-weight: 500!important;
    letter-spacing: 1px!important;
    transition: 0.20s;
}

.apply-btn {
    background: #f87e00!important;
    border-radius: 75px!important
}

.form-btn .main-text {
    font-size: 1.3rem!important;
    font-weight: 900!important;
}

.product-detail {
    border: 2px solid #e7f3fe!important;
    padding: 15px 25px 5px 25px!important;
    /* margin-bottom: 15px; */
    border-radius: 10px!important;
    /* background: #fafcfe; */
    margin-top: 10px!important;
    color: #000!important;
}

.separator {
    border: 2px solid #e7f3fe;
    border-width: 2px 2px 0 2px;
    padding: 15px 25px 5px 25px;
    border-radius: 10px 10px 0 0;
    background: #f7fbfe;
    margin: 25px 0 0 0px!important;
    padding: 10px 0!important;
    color: #000!important;
}

.product-cost-total {
    border: 2px solid #e7f3fe;
    border-width: 0 2px 2px 2px;
    padding: 15px 25px 5px 25px;
    margin-bottom: 15px;
    border-radius: 0 0 10px 10px;
    background: #f7fbfe;
    color: #000!important;
}

.payment-form {
    background: #e7f3fe33;
    border: 2px solid #e7f3feaa;
    padding: 15px 25px 25px 25px;
    /* margin-bottom: 15px; */
    border-radius: 10px;
    /* background: #fafcfe; */
    margin-top: 15px!important;
}

.coupon-container {
    margin-top: 20px!important;
}

.form-step .active {
    color: #000!important;
    font-size: 24px!important;
}

.container-order-form-two-step {
    box-shadow: none!important;
}

.form-heading {
    font-size: 18px!important;
}

.container-order-form-two-step .form-title {
    padding: 0px!important;
}

.form-title div:first-child {
    box-shadow: 2px 0 0px 0px #fff !important;
}

.form-step {
    padding: 15px 15px!important;
}

.divider-form i, .step2 i {
    color: #0094ba!important;
}

.divider-form {
    background: #0094ba!important;
}

.form-step .active {
    font-size: 22px!important;
    line-height: 1.1!important;
    font-weight: 900!important;
}

.form-sub-heading {
    padding-top: 5px;
    color: #333 !important;
    font-weight: 600 !important;
    font-size: 12px !important;
}

.order-bump-container .main-section {
    justify-content: center!important;
}

.order-bump-container {
    margin-top: 15px!important;
    background-color: #fff!important;
    color: #000!important;
}

.order-bump-container .main-section {
    background-color: #f8f8f8!important;
}

.order-bump-container .headline {
    color: #000!important;
}

.order-bump-container p {
    font-size: 14px !important;
    line-height: 1.4!important;
    padding: 5px 10px!important;
}

.bump-image {
    margin-top: 10px!important;
    max-width: 200px!important;
    margin-left: auto!important;
    margin-right: auto!important;
    display: block!important;
}

@media only screen and (max-width: 770px) and (min-width: 0px) {
    .form-step .active {
        font-size: 20px!important;
    }
}

.divider-form {
    background: #F87E00 !important;
}

.divider-form i, .step2 i {
    color: #F87E00 !important;
}

.menu-item, .header-btn .main-heading-button {
    animation: primary_nav_hover_reverse ease-out 150ms 1;
    animation-fill-mode: forwards;
}

.menu-item:hover, .main-heading-button:hover {
    animation: primary_nav_hover ease-out 300ms 1;
}

@keyframes primary_nav_hover {
    0% {
        transform: translateY(0);
        opacity: 1;
    }

    49% {
        transform: translateY(25%);
        opacity: 0;
    }

    50% {
        transform: translateY(-25%);
        opacity: 0;
    }

    100% {
        transform: translateY(0);
        opacity: 1;
    }
}

@keyframes primary_nav_hover_reverse {
    0% {
        transform: translateY(0);
        opacity: 1;
    }

    50% {
        transform: translateY(25%);
        opacity: 0;
    }

    51% {
        transform: translateY(-25%);
        opacity: 0;
    }

    100% {
        transform: translateY(0);
        opacity: 1;
    }
}

.order-bump-container {
    border: 2px solid #4CAF50 !important;
    border-radius: 12px !important;
    background-color: #f9f9f9 !important;
    box-shadow: 0 4px 10px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.08) !important;
    padding: 25px !important;
    margin: 20px 0 !important;
    position: relative !important;
    transition: all 0.3s ease-in-out !important;
}

.order-bump-container:hover {
    transform: scale(1.02) !important;
    box-shadow: 0 6px 15px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.12) !important;
    border-color: #2e7d32 !important;
}

.order-bump-container::before {
    content: "🔥 HUGE VALUE!";
    position: absolute;
    top: -12px;
    left: -12px;
    background-color: #4CAF50;
    color: white;
    padding: 5px 10px;
    font-size: 12px;
    font-weight: bold;
    border-radius: 0 0 12px 0;
    box-shadow: 0 2px 6px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.2);
    z-index: 5;
}

.order-bump-container .bump-headline {
    font-size: 20px !important;
    font-weight: 700 !important;
    color: #333 !important;
    margin-top: 10px !important;
    text-align: center;
}

.order-bump-container input.bump--checkbox {
    margin-top: 10px !important;
    transform: scale(1.2) !important;
}

.order-bump-container img.bump--flashing-arrow {
    max-width: 80px !important;
    margin-bottom: 10px !important;
}

.order-bump-container p {
    font-size: 16px !important;
    color: #444 !important;
    line-height: 1.5 !important;
    margin-top: 10px !important;
}

c-wrapper"><!----><!----><!----><div class="heading-ohA3vL0z4tl text-output cheading-ohA3vL0z4tl radius0 noBorder" data-animation-class="" style=""><div><h1>Picture yourself trapped in a sprawling maze, every corner a dead end, every step a heavier load.</h1><p></p><h1>That's where most people live: <strong>stumbling through life without a map,</strong> waiting for something to force their hand.</h1><h1></h1><p>They hold off until a crisis hits, a job loss, a bill they can't cover, before even thinking about change.</p><p></p><h1>Instead of seizing control, they <strong>drift,</strong> hoping fate will deal them a better card... only to watch time slip away.</h1><h1></h1><h1>Desperate for a fix, they hunt for the cheapest course online, a $9.99 lifeline they tell themselves will "finally work."</h1><p></p><h1>But it's just another mirage.</h1><h1></h1><p>More empty promises piling up, leaving them right where they started.</p><p></p><h1>They <strong>bounce between strategies</strong> like a pinball, chasing the next big thing, weeks, months, even years lost to hype that fades fast.</h1><h1></h1><h1>Friends push random side hustles, surveys, gigs, dropshipping, yourself trapped in a sprawling maze, every corner a dead end, every step a heavier load.\u003C/h1>\u003Cp>\u003C/p>\u003Ch1>That's where most people live: \u003Cstrong>stumbling through life without a map,\u003C/strong> waiting for something to force their hand.\u003C/h1>\u003Ch1>\u003C/h1>\u003Cp>They hold off until a crisis hits, a job loss, a bill they can't cover, before even thinking about away.\u003C/h1>\u003Ch1>\u003C/h1>\u003Ch1>Desperate for a fix, they hunt for the cheapest course online, a $9.99 lifeline they tell themselves will \"finally work.\"\u003C/h1>\u003Cp>\u003C/p>\u003Ch1>But it's just another mirage.\u003C/h1>\u003Ch1>\u003C/h1>\u003Cp>More empty promises piling up, leaving them right where they
